name: distObjInterface::CreateObject
title: distObjInterface::CreateObject
syntax: distObjRef reverse<<Interface>> distObjInterface <Interface>::CreateObject(distObjBlueprint reverse<<Interface>> blueprint, char path[]);
description: Creates a dynamic object from the blueprint.

parameters.name: blueprint
parameters.description: Blueprint which sets the attributes and virtual networks of the dynamic object.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Fully qualified name of the dynamic object.

return:
New dynamic object.
Invalid object if an error occurred.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
